channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Moby Is Donating His Profits From Coachella 2026 to Animal Rights Organizations
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: Welcome to Trending on Billboard. I'm your host, [Name]. Today, we're talking about Moby's upcoming performances at Coachella 2026. But what's really making headlines is what he's doing with the money he's making from these shows.
[Short music transition]
Host: Moby announced on social media that he's donating all the revenue from his Coachella performances to four animal rights organizations: Physicians Committee for Responsible Medicine, Humane League, Mercy for Animals, and Direct Action Everywhere. He chose these organizations because of their unique work in the world of animal rights.
[Short music transition]
Host: Moby, a longtime animal rights activist, believes that every sentient being is entitled to live their life according to their will. He's using his platform to draw attention to and financially support these organizations. If you missed his first performance on April 10, don't worry – he's playing again on April 17 in the Mojave Tent, and the show will be livestreamed on YouTube for a global audience.
[Outro music plays]
Host: That's it for today's episode. Thanks for tuning in to Trending on Billboard. We'll be back with more music news and updates soon.
